args: CLI (non-UCI): command parsing, context, handlers, perft/eval/search entry points.
CLI command: PERFT, EVAL, EVAL_BATCH, EVAL_BREAKDOWN_BATCH, SEARCH, NONE.
Short option characters for getopt (h, v, F, d, E, S, N).
Parsed CLI context: fen, eval, search, nnue_path, depth, command.
Command to show help for (or COMMAND_NONE for general).
Engine core: Engine struct, init, and global engine instance.
Piece values (0–5 = PAWN..KING) for display or tuning.
Engine descriptor: name, author, function pointers (search, eval, order), and board.
Initialize engine with name and author; set function pointers and board state.
Global engine instance; expected to be defined in main or startup.
Returns true if the position is a draw by 50-move rule, threefold repetition, or insufficient material.
Evaluation: EvalFn type, PeSTO (material+PST, terms), NNUE wrapper, breakdown.
Function pointer: Board* -> int (centipawns, side-to-move perspective).
Per-term breakdown for PeSTO eval (centipawns, side-to-move). total equals pesto_eval when convention matches.
Fills *out with per-term breakdown; returns same value as pesto_eval.
Logs eval breakdown to stderr (e.g. for debugging).
Initialize PeSTO tables. Call once at startup.
For Texel tuning: set mg_value[6], eg_value[6] and rebuild tables.
Material + PST only, from white's perspective (centipawns).
Evaluate position. Uses NNUE if loaded; otherwise returns 0 (caller should use PeSTO).
Centipawns or 0 if NNUE not loaded.
Eval cache: clear, probe, store, cached eval wrapper.
Clear the eval cache. Call at the start of each search.
Probe cache by Zobrist key. Returns true and sets *out_score if hit.
Evaluate position with cache: probe first, on miss call eval(board) and store result.
Move ordering: OrderFn type, MVV-LVA, killer, history, TT move.
Function pointer: order moves in place (board, moves, count, ply).
Array of moves to order (modified in place).
Set the transposition table move for the next order_moves call (search it first).
Depth of the search that caused the cutoff.
NNUE network load/query; engine falls back to PeSTO if not loaded.
Load NNUE network from file. If no NNUE backend is linked, returns false and eval falls back to PeSTO.
Whether an NNUE net is loaded and ready.
Search: config, stats, root/PVS/quiescence, timer, and global search state.
Search parameters: depth, time, null-move, LMR, aspiration, TT, quiescence, Syzygy options.
Counters and diagnostics for the last search (nodes, qnodes, TT hits, selDepth).
Function pointer: root search (board, eval, order, config) -> best Move.
Time limit in milliseconds (0 = no limit).
Global search statistics for last search.
Global search config (set by UCI go command).
Syzygy tablebases: init, free, probe WDL/DTZ, piece count.
Whether tablebases are loaded and usable.
Return value when probe fails; caller uses normal eval.

Probe WDL for current position. Returns score in centipawns (or draw/mate-like) if probe succeeds; otherwise SYZYGY_PROBE_FAILED. Call only when piece count <= limit, depth <= probe_depth, and (if 50-move rule) halfmove == 0 and castling == 0.
Whether to apply 50-move rule for TB.
At root: probe DTZ and fill in best move if position is in TB.
Output: best move if TB hit.
True if TB move was chosen (best_move_out set).
Transposition table: entry type, init/clear, probe/store.
TT score type: exact, lower bound, upper bound, or none.
Single TT entry: key, depth, score, type, best move, generation.
Call at start of each search_root.
True if probe hit and score/move are valid.
UCI protocol: option types, state, commands, handlers, search thread sync.
Option kind: check, spin, combo, string.
String names for UciOptionType (for UCI output).
Engine state: waiting, thinking, stopped, ready, quit, pondering, etc.
Single UCI option: name, type, value (check/spin/combo/string), params, default.
Full UCI state: start FEN, mode flags, time, options, status, last command.
Lock before writing to stdout from any thread.
Block until the search thread is idle.
Signal the search thread to run search (called from uci_go).
Start the search worker thread. Call once from UciMain before the command loop.
Ask the search thread to exit and wait for it. Call before process exit.
Set start position FEN and init board.
Abort with TODO message (file, line, message).
Version numbers and string; version() helper.
Version as single integer (major*10000 + minor*100 + patch).
Default engine name; override with -DENGINE_NAME=\"YourName\" when compiling.
Fills in the provided pointers with the current version numbers.
Pointer to store major version (or NULL).
Pointer to store minor version (or NULL).
Pointer to store patch version (or NULL).
